src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/R.general_idea: Replace direct usage of Jackson ObjectMapper with a centralized JsonUtils utility class.
Add logic to automatically convert raw GraphQL query strings and variables into a standard JSON payload structure for RSocket.
Introduce a newBody field and update getBodyBytes to return the converted GraphQL JSON body if present, otherwise the original body.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/R.human_impl: private String newBody; ... public byte[] getBodyBytes() { if (this.newBody != null) return newBody.getBytes(...); ... }

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/R.general_idea: Update WebSocket endpoint path extraction to handle various scheme prefixes (rsocketws, +ws) instead of just /rsocket.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.general_idea: Make GrpcExecutor implement the BaseExecutor interface to conform to the new execution contract.
Change execute method return type from void to List<byte[]> to support response handling.
Replace standard error printing with structured logging using HttpxErrorCodeLogger.
Replace direct ObjectMapper usage with JsonUtils utility for JSON parsing and serialization.
Update scheme checking to explicitly handle https and grpcs for insecure flag, defaulting others to plaintext.
Integrate JavaScript test execution into the response handling flow.
Return the process output as a byte array list to satisfy the new interface contract.
Return an empty list in case of exceptions or early exits to satisfy the new interface contract.
Remove explicit null check for headers, assuming the caller or framework ensures non-null headers.
Format JSON output for better readability in console logs.
Refactor HttpExecutor to extend HttpBaseExecutor to share common HTTP execution logic.
Introduce logic to ignore specific internal headers and those starting with 'x-args-' or named 'x-body-name' during request construction.
Add support for disabling automatic redirects when the request contains a 'no-redirect' tag.
Integrate cookie handling by retrieving cookies for the host and attaching them to the HTTP client.
Add support for a custom 'CHATGPT' HTTP method in the switch statement, treating it as a POST request.
Delegate the actual HTTP request execution and response processing to a method in the parent class or helper, changing the return type to List<byte[]>.
RSocketExecutor now implements the BaseExecutor interface to fit into the new execution framework.
Replaced static error hooks and printStackTrace with a structured HttpxErrorCodeLogger for better observability.
Changed execute method return type from void to List<byte[]> to support data retrieval in the new API.
Refactored the request type dispatching logic to use a Java switch expression for cleaner control flow.
Added support for GRAPHQL and GRAPHQLRS request types, routing subscriptions to streams and others to request-response.
Integrated a JavaScript test runner hook to validate responses within the execution flow.
Modified requestStream to collect and return all payload data as a list of byte arrays instead of just printing.
Extended URI scheme support to include 'rsocket' alongside 'tcp' for transport creation.
Added automatic JSON pretty-printing for readable output when the content type is JSON.
